X.description: ClearHistory 后端同步, Error/SecurityBlocked/EmergencyStopped 对话区显示, 活动指示器 3 行 + rounds/tools 计数, 完成摘要, CC 风格 git 状态

phase_name: Phase X — TUI 运行状态增强
key_decisions: AgentMessage::ClearHistory variant — /clear now clears backend history + session store
All error/security/emergency events render as visible messages in conversation area
task_start_time cleared on all terminal events (Completed/Done/Error/EmergencyStopped)
ActivityIndicator expanded to 3 rows (border-content-border) for visual prominence
Completion summary: elapsed | rounds r tools t | input output — only when tool_calls>0 or rounds>1
refresh_git_info() parses porcelain XY codes + rev-list @{u}..HEAD for unpushed count

deferred.description: octo root migrate — auto-migrate legacy DB locations to new OctoRoot layout
deferred.precondition: When users need automated migration from legacy paths
When multi-project config management is needed

deferred.description: Dependency graph topo-sort wiring — no builtin skills use dependencies currently
deferred.precondition: When skills with inter-dependencies are added

notes: Phase X COMPLETE. 4/4 tasks. TUI runtime status enhancements: (1) /clear now syncs backend history via ClearHistory message, (2) Error/Security/Emergency events show as visible messages in conversation area instead of silent state clearing, (3) Activity indicator expanded to 3 rows with rounds/tools counter, (4) Completion summary with elapsed/rounds/tools/tokens appended after tool-using tasks, (5) Git status CC-style with staged/modified/untracked/unpushed breakdown. Tests: 461 octo-cli tests pass, 2387 workspace total (unchanged).
